_comment: Claude Code settings for LM Studio headless on Mac Studio (port 1234). LM Studio is OpenAI-compat only — does NOT speak the Anthropic API. Use Claude Code's OpenAI-compat env-var path (CLAUDE_CODE_USE_OPENAI=1), or run claude-code-router for Anthropic-to-OpenAI translation. Default model is gemma-4-26b-a4b-q8 (current production main).
